notes:
## QA Fixes
- HIGH-002: Replace std::sync::Mutex with parking_lot::Mutex in store.rs (removes 22 unwrap calls)
- LOW-004: Bounded thread pool in trigger.rs (max 8 concurrent substitution threads)
- LOW-003: Split App.tsx into components/ (SnippetEditor, SettingsPanel)
- LOW-001: Remove committed log.txt artifact
- LOW-002: Remove production console.log from sendMessage
- LOW-005: Move hardcoded Indonesian confirm dialogs to i18n
- LOW-006: Clarify docs/Variables.md unsupported key documentation
- HIGH-001: Add UTF-8 safe StrExt trait (char_count, truncate_chars)
- MED-001: Pre-compile all 17 regex patterns with once_cell::sync::Lazy
